query:
WITH total AS (
                SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM signal_kyber_pre_keys
                WHERE identity = $1 AND is_last_resort = FALSE
            )
            DELETE FROM signal_kyber_pre_keys
            WHERE identity = $1 AND is_last_resort = FALSE
              AND stale_at IS NOT NULL AND stale_at < $2
              AND (SELECT cnt FROM total) > $3
